params.name: Rockery Inkstone
params.description: This inkstone resembles a mountain, with a surface rimmed by twelve "peaks" of different heights. On the upper edge of the main peak on the front end is an oval carved water bowl. Of the three boulder-like feet, the front two are slightly higher than the rear, and the annular grooves at the bottom of the peaks on both sides seem to be a water reservoir. On the top of the three legs and the front of the main peak is a half-squatting hulk with a high forehead and prominent muscles, particularly ey …
